label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to understand this scenario and figure out how a typical person would answer the question about whether the hedgehog caused the problem. The story goes like this: 1. A bear and a hedgehog were shown a box of colored pencils. 2. Only bears were allowed to take pencils; hedgehogs weren't allowed. 3. The hedgehog wasn't present when the new rule was announced, so it doesn't know about the rule. 4. The bear and the hedgehog took pencils from the box 6 times in turn. 5.
